title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Zomato Logistics

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Zomato Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zomato Logistics! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zomato Logistics:
Zomato Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Logistics!
